Python toolkit (fuzzy + exact + probabilistic dedupe, identity graph, PPRL, LLM boost) and a full TypeScript port on npm: goldenmatch, goldencheck, goldenflow, infermap, goldenpipe. SQL-native at parity in PostgreSQL and DuckDB. Zero-config auto-tuning, MCP/REST/A2A servers, dbt + Airflow recipes.
